title: Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: The Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary was established in 1989 in Indore, Madhya Pradesh.
overview.description: The Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary was established in 1989 in Indore, Madhya Pradesh. It is spread over five square kilometers and is home to different species of birds and other wildlife. It has an ancient palace built by Holkar which was primarily used as a hunting hut also known as shikargah (hunting lodge). .

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Gyankriti
topPlaces.description: Gyankriti, is an education group which is operating a senior secondary school in Indore, India, since 2013. The organization is founded and managed by two IIT Bombay alumni Akshay Gupta and Yograj Patel right after they opted-out of placements.

topPlaces.name: Tillore
topPlaces.description: Tillore Khurd is a village located in the Indore district of Madhya Pradesh, India. It is also a gram panchayat according to 2009 stats and situated 15 km away from Indore, which is both a district and sub-district headquarter of Tillor Khurd village.

topPlaces.name: Tincha waterfall
topPlaces.description: The Tincha Waterfall is located in Tillore within the Indore district in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Bicholi Hapsi
topPlaces.description: Bicholi Hapsi is a Census Town situated in Indore district of Madhya Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Palda
topPlaces.description: Palda is a census town in Indore district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Kampel, Indore
topPlaces.description: Kampel is a panchayat village in the Indore block of the Indore district, Madhya Pradesh, India. It was the headquarters of a pargana in Mughal Empire before the administrative center of the region was shifted to Indore city under the Holkars of the Maratha Empire.

topPlaces.name: Indore division
topPlaces.description: Indore division is an administrative geographical unit of Madhya Pradesh state of India. Indore is the administrative headquarters of the division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Devi Ahilya Bai Holkar Airport, Indore (19 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhopal Junction (162 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ralamandal Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gyankriti, Tillore, Tincha waterfall, Bicholi Hapsi, Palda.
